# Pull request

## What does this change?

Describe the fix, feature, or recommendation in a sentence or two.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Filter/rule improvement
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `develop` (see CONTRIBUTING.md for the branching model)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] User-facing copy uses plain punctuation and sentence case
- [ ] No native `confirm`/`alert`/`prompt`/`<select>` (used the components in `src/ui/`)

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots.
